Quality Education.reason: The course provides education on human rights and citizenship values through its content on patient autonomy. Links to Target 4.7.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Addresses inequalities by focusing on the rights and inclusion of vulnerable groups like the elderly and those with dementia. Links to Targets 10.2 and 10.3.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Examines legal frameworks like the 'Patient Right to Autonomy Act' to ensure access to justice and promote the rule of law in healthcare. Links to Target 16.3.
